title: HIVE Digital Technologies Recent News Summary
text: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. recent news summary shows the company is shifting from pure cryptocurrency mining toward AI data center infrastructure and computational capacity services. Recent news articles highlight: AI Factory Investment where HIVE invested $3.1 million in Eastern Canada's first sovereign AI factory project. New Brunswick Data Center Upgrade where the company's BUZZ initiative is advancing a New Brunswick AI data center with fiber network improvements. AI Infrastructure Pivot where analysis suggests HIVE is quietly redefining its identity around AI infrastructure rather than its traditional cryptocurrency mining focus. Bitcoin Infrastructure for AI showing HIVE Digital is positioning its existing Bitcoin infrastructure to support the emerging AI boom. Stock Price was $2.82, down 1.74% at close on May 8. Market Cap was $714.184M. Next Earnings Date is February 17, 2026. 52-Week Range is $1.60 to $7.84. The company appears to be shifting from pure cryptocurrency mining toward AI data center infrastructure and computational capacity services.
